title: Phase 3: Close the write-back loop and decommission OpenClaw
summary: Make Claude Code sessions feed the brain, give the PWA a notes-app-feeling quick-capture, expose the same path as an iOS voice Shortcut, and retire OpenClaw.
outOfScope: New entity types beyond what migration produced (Phase 4 Track D, demand-driven)
Apple Watch complication and PWA dark mode polish (Phase 4 Track F)
technicalConsiderations: New PWA route /capture and POST /api/capture endpoint sharing the brain.pending_episodes queue from Phase 2
iOS Shortcut config doc lives in pwa/docs/ios-shortcut.md
Tagged commit before OpenClaw removal so revert is git-one-command
Risks: background worker is a single point of failure (mitigation: startup drain + queue depth on /admin), iOS Shortcut bearer-at-rest, summary verbosity tuning
